studies.title: Evaluation of the Impact of Vitadio on HbA1c in Patients with Type 2 Diabetes mellitus in daily practice

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product Vitadio, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title and scientific summary. The study investigates the impact of Vitadio on HbA1c levels in patients with type 2 diabetes, aligning with the product's intended use.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a multicenter, randomized, open-controlled trial, which indicates that participants are randomly allocated to an intervention group and a control group, fulfilling the criteria for an RCT.
